_fixture_notes: Case 2: Recipe with many distinct group labels and some ingredients/steps left ungrouped (group: null) alongside grouped ones. Six ingredient groups: pickle, dressing, crispy topping, base, roasted veg, herb salad — plus three ungrouped 'to finish' ingredients. Steps mix group labels with two null-group assembly/finishing steps that span multiple sections. Tests cooking-mode UI sectioning when the section vocabulary is dense and non-exhaustive.
name: Layered Freekeh & Roasted Vegetable Bowl
description: A layered mezze-style bowl with quick-pickled onion, herb-flecked freekeh, roasted vegetables and crispy chickpeas. Fixture for many-group / mixed-null group testing.

ingredients.name: tinned chickpeas, drained and patted dry

steps.title: Quick-pickle the onion
steps.content: Combine {0001} with {0002} and a pinch of salt in a small bowl. Toss with your hands to coat, then leave to soften while you prepare the rest.

steps.title: Make the tahini dressing
steps.content: Whisk {0003}, {0004} and {0005} together — it will thicken first, then loosen. Whisk in {0006} a tablespoon at a time until pourable but still coating.

steps.title: Cook the freekeh
steps.content: Rinse {0010}, then combine with {0011} and {0012} in a saucepan. Bring to a boil, reduce to a simmer, cover, and cook for 20-25 minutes until tender. Drain any residual liquid and fluff with a fork.

steps.title: Roast the vegetables
steps.content: Heat oven to 220°C. Toss {0013}, {0014} and {0015} with {0016} and {0017} on a large tray. Roast for 25-30 minutes, turning halfway, until caramelised at the edges.

steps.title: Crisp the chickpeas
steps.content: Heat {0008} in a frying pan over medium-high heat. Add {0007} and fry for 6-8 minutes, shaking the pan occasionally, until golden and crisp at the edges. Stir through {0009} for the last 30 seconds and season.

steps.title: Toss the herb salad
steps.content: In a bowl, combine {0018}, {0019} and {0020}. Don't dress — it will keep fresher for assembly.

steps.title: Assemble the bowls
steps.content: Spoon the freekeh into four bowls. Top with the roasted vegetables, the herb salad, the crispy chickpeas and the pickled onion (drained). Drizzle generously with the tahini dressing.

steps.title: Finish and serve
steps.content: Scatter over {0021}, drizzle with {0022} and sprinkle with {0023}. Serve immediately.

notes: All components hold well separately — assemble at the table for meal prep. The dressing keeps for 3 days in the fridge but will need loosening with water before serving.
